data.name: An .apkg mixed package is Apkg's proprietary format that bundles multiple .deb packages into a single upload. After processing, each contained .deb is extracted and synced to its target APT repository.
data.value: An .apkg mixed package is Apkg's proprietary format that bundles multiple .deb packages into a single upload. After processing, each contained .deb is extracted and synced to its target APT repository.

data.name: Upload via CLI with apkg push or use the Web UI. Uploads must be published before they appear in repositories.
data.value: Upload via CLI with apkg push or use the Web UI. Uploads must be published before they appear in repositories.
